programme.title: BBC News The Context
programme.desc: A regular panel of guests from across the political spectrum discuss the biggest international stories of the day.

programme.title: BBC News America
programme.desc: Live news program produced out of BBC's Washington, D.C. bureau; host Sumi Somaskanda.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: In the Americas With David Yetman
programme.desc: The Mississippi, the largest river in North America, presents a challenge for the Army Corps of Engineers around New Orleans.

programme.title: Outside: Beyond the Lens
programme.desc: Jeff is invited inside the rarely-seen operations of the 144th Fighter Wing base in Fresno.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Actors Ted Danson, Mary Steenburgen and William H. Macy trace their nonconformist ancestors back to the Puritan establishment.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.desc: Congress puts George Washington in command of a new Continental Army; Congress declares American independence in July 1776.

programme.title: A More Perfect Union: Inspiring Civic & Civil Conversations Across America
programme.desc: A look at America's founding and how the ideas and values articulated 250 years ago remain relevant to conversations about governance today.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Festive Europe & Why We Travel
America's Test Kitchen Celebrates 25 Years
programme.desc: Going behind-the-scenes with "America's Test Kitchen" hosts Bridget Lancaster and Julia Collin Davison to highlight the food, science and kitchen ingenuity that made the show's 25 years a success.

programme.title: America's Home Cooking: Flavors of the Fourth
programme.desc: Celebrating picnics and barbecue with Chris Fennimore and the America's Home Cooking team; recipes include horseradish potato salad, baked beans, apple hand pies and more summer favorites.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.desc: Lyla and Luke clean Stu without a bath; Lyla and Ale find a way to protect the callaloo plants from stink bugs.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Stuck without power in the bamboo forests of China, the Wild Kratts must figure out how to save the pandas, who are being turned into stuffed toys by villain Zach Varmitech.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: Speak Up Francine; Waiting for Snow
programme.desc: Francine must overcome her fear of public speaking so she can voice her concern about pollution at the Earth Day rally; Ladonna dreams of skiing and sledding.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: It's an exciting day for Lily and her family when they move into their new house.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.desc: Lyla and Luke clean Stu without a bath; Lyla and Ale find a way to protect the callaloo plants from stink bugs.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: A Collection to Get Rid of; The Button Collection
programme.desc: Carl and his friends clean up the Fuzzytown Park; Carl accidentally breaks the birthday present Sheldon planned to give his mom.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel Explores Nature; Daniel's Nature Walk
programme.desc: Daniel and his family explore nature, watching a red bird build a nest; Daniel, O the Owl and Uncle X take a nature walk through the forest.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe, Jay and Lupe practice their fire safety plan when the fire inspector visits; Phoebe and Jay buy juice from Mr. Aguilar.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Elmo, Grover, and all their friends help Charlie build a Little Library for her Mitzvah Day project for her synagogue. Helping neighbors share books is Charlie's way of making the world a kinder place.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: Ellie's Island; Zadie & Buckley's Playdate Problem
programme.desc: Ellie's so excited to be going home to Jamaica that the Wombats and Mr. E start to worry whether she'll come back; Buckley comes over for a playdate with Zadie.

programme.title: Donkey Hodie
programme.sub-title: Meemaw Heehaw's Recipe Mystery; Extra-Large Crunchdoodles
programme.desc: Donkey and Grampy try to make an old family recipe; Donkey and Panda are excited to try a new cereal.

programme.title: Rosie's Rules
programme.sub-title: Rosie the Recycling Kid; Rosie's Mariposa
programme.desc: It's Recycling Day, so Rosie becomes a recycling kid, but she accidentally recycles Crystal's art project; when Rosie and Javi find a monarch butterfly in the backyard, they try to figure out what it needs so it can flutter again.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programme.desc: Elinor and her friends are inspired to build a nest; Elinor and her friends learn that it is good to eat different types of foods.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alma's Way
programme.desc: Alma tells all her friends that Howard is moving; Alma wonders if she should buy new materials for her recycled art project.

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.desc: Molly and Vera think about teaching more tourists in Qyah about wildfire prevention; Molly can't wait to hunt for seagull eggs.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum
programme.sub-title: I Am Mark Twain; I Am Abigail Adams
programme.desc: Xavier is afraid he will be unable to perform his comedy show after he hurts his wrist, but Mark Twain shows him that laughter can make hard things easier; Abigail Adams helps Yadina realize that a missing color will not ruin her painting.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Actors Ted Danson, Mary Steenburgen and William H. Macy trace their nonconformist ancestors back to the Puritan establishment.

programme.title: Friends & Neighbors
programme.desc: Join hosts Sherry Tatum and Sandra Onal for a half hour of laughs, love and life lessons.

programme.title: In Their Hands
programme.desc: Ronnie Carrasquillo was convicted of killing a plain-clothes police officer 47 years ago; his family and attorneys continue to fight for his freedom.

programme.title: Energy Switch
programme.desc: Two veteran pollsters discuss climate, environment and energy; featuring Ashley Grosse and Alec Tyson.

programme.title: American Grown: My Job Depends on Ag
programme.desc: The future of the agriculture industry and stories of how it touches us all far beyond the table.

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Tiger expert Valmik Thapar uncovers 50 years of archival footage chronicling the tiger clan of northwestern India's Ranthambore National Park.

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: Scientists try to figure out how to predict weather events called "rain bombs" that sink ships and down planes.

programme.title: Wilding
programme.desc: Isabella Tree and her husband, Charlie Burrell, strive to breathe new life into the ailing Knepp estate. They reintroduce native ponies, deer, pigs and other wildlife, allowing nature to thrive.

programme.title: Human Footprint
programme.desc: Exploring the modern city, including three species that thrive in that ecosystem.

programme.title: Moments to Remember (My Music Presents)
programme.desc: Frankie Laine, Julius LaRosa, the Four Lads, the Four Freshmen and Herb Reed's Platters are a few of the musicians who perform their hits of the late 1950s and early '60s.

programme.desc: Rick Steves tours the Italian heartland, including Umbria, Assisi, Siena, and the Cinque Terre.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: Dot and Al announce the Hunters are spending Christmas in Nigeria, and Corky wonders if she can have a fun Christmas without snow.

programme.sub-title: Lyla Can't Sleep; Hairdos and Hair Don'ts

programme.sub-title: Acornball; Super Duper Magic Fun Box
programme.desc: Donkey and Panda make up a game while waiting for Gameshow Gator's new game; Donkey and Panda disagree on which toys are fun.

programme.title: Rosie's Rules
programme.sub-title: An Anniversary Tradition; Chiles en Nogada Day
programme.desc: Rosie, Crystal and Iggy try to recreate Mom and Papá's beach anniversary tradition at home; it's Chiles en Nogada Day, but when Papá loses the recipe, it's up to Rosie to figure out who else might have it.

programme.desc: Elinor finds a peculiar-looking owl while visiting her grandparents in the desert; Olive and her friends investigate why a tree has fallen over in the forest.
